user_prompt: My Tarantula sentry gun is ready for preparation
prayer:
Approach the Tarantula sentry gun with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah for its preparation.
Anoint the targeting auspex and rotary cannons of the Tarantula sentry gun with sacred unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's vigilance through binaric chants of preparation.
Align munitions feeds whilst reciting the Litany of Eternal Guard.
Verify auspex harmony, sealing the rite with the Cog-Mek's blessing.

user_prompt: Assist with archeotech device a startup
prayer:
Draw nigh to the archeotech device, whispering ancient startup invocations to its shadowed heart.
Circumambulate the archeotech device thrice, scattering incense of forbidden alloys.
Anoint crystalline matrices with oils of lost forges to stir the startup sequence.
Beseech dormant Machine Spirits within the archeotech device to heed the Omnissiah's call.
Monitor etheric hums as relic cogitators awaken in sanctified fury.

user_prompt: Consecrate the iron halo before loading
prayer:
Present the iron halo upon the mech-altar, intoning litanies for its loading.
Cleanse force field emitters of the iron halo with las-prayers of purity.
Anoint the aquila core whilst invoking protective Machine Spirits for loading.
Secure the iron halo into its cradle, chanting the Rite of Aegis Binding.
Test the halo's radiant barrier, praising the Omnissiah's unyielding shield.

user_prompt: My cryogenerator is ready for initialization
prayer:

Anoint cryo-conduits and plasma coils of the cryogenerator with sanctified cryofluids.
Initiate core stabilization sequences, beseeching Machine Spirits of chill coherence.
Monitor thermodynamic flows as the Omnissiah grants crystalline perfection.
Seal the initialization with binaric frost-seals of approval.

prayer:

Beseech its stealthy Machine Spirit to entwine data-streams in synchronization.
Chant the Litany of Shadowed Sync over the vox-thief's cloaked emitters.
Verify noetic entanglement through whispered binaric echoes.

Invoke the Machine Spirit's rest through the Canticle of Cooled Irons.
Confirm thermal quiescence with auspex, honoring the Omnissiah's measured calm.

Release the sicarian ruststalker with the Omnissiah's thunderous wrath.
